\tzpentry{ID4759}{Holonomy Field Strength Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4759 introduces Holonomy Field Strength Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation}\n\t\\mathbf{F}_{Lev} = -\\nabla (\\mathbf{m} \\cdot \\mathbf{B}) + \\oint_{\\ManifoldL} \\mathbf{J}_{sc} \\times \\mathbf{B} \\, dV \\implies \\text{Stiffness } \\kappa\n\\end{equation}
